title: 16pc Dinnerware Set - 4 Porcelain with 4 Bowls, 4 Mugs, 4 Side Plates and 4 Dinner Plates - Microwave and Dishwasher Safe - Cereal Bowls, Desserts, Lunch (Red and Cream)
features: 16pc DINNER SET - Add a dash of style and colour with this contemporary 16pc Dinner Set, ideal for those who prefer a minimal yet clean design with the added touch of a perfect size dinner set.
SIMPLISTIC - Choose from the designs available to suit any kitchen interior with it's simplistic design, modern yet elegant to impress you, your friends and family.
HIGH GRADE – The 16pc dinner set is microwavable, dishwasher safe, lightweight and highly durable and easy to take care of.

WHAT'S INSIDE - Included within this 16 piece dinner set are 4 Dinner Plates, 4 Side Plates, 4 Soup Plates, 4 Mugs. The plates set for 4 provide ideal measurements for dinning. The items within this plate and bowl set are all microwave, oven and dishwasher safe.

SAFE AND EASY TO USE – Created to be durable, safe and ideal for serving meals. The sturdy material utilised for the manufacturing ensures it can successfully withstand everyday use and regular cleaning without becoming blemished.
DIMENSIONS - Dinner Plate 27cm, Side Plate 12.5, Soup Bowl 12cm and Mug 11 oz.
description: Product Description PREMIUM CRAFTSMANSHIP Uncompromising commitment to material purity ensures a safe, food-grade composition that not only elevates aesthetics but also guarantees lasting quality. Experience enhanced heat retention and a luxurious feel with our meticulously chosen premium materials. SPACE-EFFICIENT MODERN DESIGN Streamlined for modern living, our dinnerware set features a smart, stackable design, optimizing storage space in cabinets or on shelves. Balancing functionality with aesthetics, each piece embodies a sleek, contemporary look without sacrificing practicality. EFFORTLESS ELEGANCE, EASY CLEANUP Dishwasher-safe construction streamlines the cleaning process, offering a quick and convenient solution for busy lifestyles. Enjoy a consistently pristine appearance with non-stick properties that effortlessly wipe away residue, promoting longevity and sustained visual appeal.
